2606.07102.title: GP-Adapter: Gaussian Process CLIP-Adapter for Few-Shot Out-of-Distribution Detection
2606.07102.paper_summary: We propose GP-Adapter, a training-free framework that augments CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training) with Gaussian Process (GP) uncertainty modeling for few-shot classification and out-of-distribution (OOD) detection. While CLIP achieves strong zero-shot recognition, it yields deterministic similarity scores and offers limited uncertainty information, which is critical under distribution shift and data scarcity. GP-Adapter constructs modality-specific, class-wise one-class GPs on top of frozen CLIP embeddings using an RBF kernel for image features and a linear kernel for text prompts and fuses their predictive statistics to produce a variance-aware confidence score for OOD detection. The method requires no fine-tuning of the CLIP backbone and relies only on a small $K$-shot cache and lightweight hyperparameter selection, with memory cost scaling as $O(CK^2)$ for $C$ classes and $K$ shots. Experiments on ImageNet and multiple OOD benchmarks show that GP-Adapter provides competitive few-shot performance and consistently improves OOD detection when combined with prompt-learning baselines, highlighting the complementarity between GP-based uncertainty modeling and prompt learning. Overall, our results suggest that integrating probabilistic inference with large pre-trained vision-language models can improve reliability in low-data and distribution-shifted settings. Code is available at https://github.com/tms-byte/GP-Adapter
2606.07102.paper_summary_zh: 我們提出了 GP-Adapter，一個無需訓練的框架，通過高斯過程（GP）不確定性建模來增強 CLIP（對比語言-圖像預訓練）以實現少量樣本分類和異常檢測（OOD）。雖然 CLIP 在零樣本識別中表現出色，但它產生的相似性分數是確定性的，並且提供的 不確定性信息有限，這在分佈變化和數據稀缺的情況下至關重要。GP-Adapter 在凍結的 CLIP 嵌入上構建特定於模態、按類別劃分的一類 GP，對於圖像特徵使用 RBF 核，對於文本提示使用線性核，並融合它們的預測統計以生成一個考慮方差的置信分數以進行 OOD 檢測。該方法不需要微調 CLIP 主幹，只依賴於少量的 $K$-shot 緩存和輕量級超參數選擇，內存成本隨著 $O(CK^2)$ 的增長，其中 $C$ 是類別數，$K$ 是樣本數。對 ImageNet 和多個 OOD 基準的實驗表明，GP-Adapter 提供了具有競爭力的少量樣本性能，並在與提示學習基準結合時持續改善 OOD 檢測，突顯了基於 GP 的不確定性建模與提示學習之間的互補性。總體而言，我們的結果表明，將概率推斷與大型預訓練的視覺-語言模型相結合，可以提高在低數據和分佈變化環境中的可靠性。代碼可在 https://github.com/tms-byte/GP-Adapter 獲得。
2606.07102.author: Taisei Saito et.al.
2606.07102.authors: Taisei Saito, Koretaka Ogata, Takafumi Hiroi
